blocked_claims: No K_nm measured-magnitude validation from topology correlation alone.
No physical-unit Josephson coupling claim from nominal literature parameters.
No hardware-device coupling-map claim without backend calibration provenance.
No promotion over EEG or power-grid controls until the same gates pass.
claim_boundary: Topology-correlation candidate and magnitude-study preregistration only; this artifact does not validate K_nm physical coupling magnitudes.

evidence_required: coupling_unit must denote calibrated Hz, rad/s, GHz, or derived Josephson energy
every coupling edge must carry source metadata
gates.name: calibrated_coupling_units

evidence_required: per-edge uncertainty is finite and non-negative
gates.name: locked_normalisation_and_uncertainty

evidence_required: all reported edges participate in the fit
gates.name: direct_magnitude_fit

evidence_required: weighted adjacency and Laplacian spectra are recorded
gates.name: spectral_response

next_actions: Collect or derive a calibrated Josephson/transmon coupling artifact in the declared schema.
Run the existing K_nm physical-validation audit on the calibrated artifact at the candidate and extension sizes.
Require direct magnitude, spectral response, uncertainty, and null-model gates before promotion.
